Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Grant Pettiton For Confirmation Of Arb Award; And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER TRIAL & TECHNOLOGY LAW GROUP, A PROFESSIONAL corporation's motion To Grant Pettiton For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The arbitration award attached to the petition dated March 21, 2013 is confirmed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185
=(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Grant Pettiton For Confirmation Of Arb Award; And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Continued To Jul-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER TRIAL & TECHNOLOGY LAW GROUP's Motion To Grant Pettiton For Confirmation Of Arbitration Award; And For Entry Of Judgment is continued to July 5, 2013, to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Please provide a courtesy copy of the Spanner declaration by June 26, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing. The Court has the other portions of the motion. Judge: Marla J.
